name: Chrono Pendulum "Buildup"
descriptionTemplate: Picking up grants all Awakeners 30 Aliemus. Each release of Exalt increases the Count by 1 point. After releasing the Posse, gain [Arg1] Temporary {Alert}, [Arg2] Temporary {STR}, and all Awakeners gain 6 Aliemus, consuming all Count, with each Count point taking effect 1 additional time.
